solutions.cpp: #include <iostream> using namespace std; class Solution { public: int gcd(int a, int b) { if (a<b) return b; return a; } }; int main() { Solution solution; int a, b; cin >> a >> b; cout << solution.gcd(a, b) << endl; return 0; }
solutions.python: import sys class Solution: def gcd(self, a: int, b: int) -> int: if a<b: return b; return a def main(): a, b = map(int, input().split()); solution = Solution(); print(solution.gcd(a, b)); if __name__ == '__main__': main()
